zh.Stratford-upon-Avon, Warwickshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃
zh.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: 英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hill於1540年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親William Hill23歲，母親Joan Annable16歲。他於大約1569年與Joan Annable在英國戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1611年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hill于1540年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲时，他的父亲William Hill23岁，母亲Joan Annable16岁。他于大约1569年与Joan Annable在英国戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1611年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Hill was born in 1540, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Hill, was 23 and his mother, Joan Annable, was 16. He married Joan Annable about 1569, in Exeter, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1611, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hill est né en 1540, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Hill, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan Annable, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Joan Annable environ 1569, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1611, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hillが1540年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで生まれた時，父William Hillは23歳，母Joan Annableは16歳であった。約1569年にイギリスデボンエクセターでJoan Annableと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1611年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで71歳で死去した。

ko.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: William Hill(이)가 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hill(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Annable(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1569년 영국 데폰 세터에서 Joan Annable(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1611년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hill родился в 1540 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Hill было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Annable, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Annable около 1569 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1611 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
